title: The CWSM has Virus Tweaks
description: That make every think new textures of blocks and sound and more on creaker, s wither storm mod, new update to general model of 1.20.1
body:
This pack makes you in the 1.20.1 update, 1.16.5 has a lots Features

 

We added in:

•The wither storm theme

•The withered Symbiont theme

•The Old version of 1.16.5 textures to newer textures

•blocks textures

•the withered symbiont his glow back texture is cannot be fixed, exept 1.18.2

•old amulet to 1.18.2 mod amulet texture for 1.16.5

•The Wither storm his head texture is alse fixed Solved

•New Update to Model of 1.20.1

•Models request[EMF mod and ETF mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions)

 

To support for the mods, we needs:

•The crackers wither storm mod

•The explosive blocks(the creaker s wither storm mod) on curseforge. Or here?

 
sorry for an late upload Images

join me in my discord server:

So Hopefully you Enjoying My Resource pack😊
